short_description: HDFS DataNode disk full on cdp-worker-03
description: DataNode cdp-worker-03 is reporting disk usage at 98%. Write operations are failing with DiskOutOfSpaceException. Affected directory: /data/hdfs/dn/current.
Spark job analytics_etl_daily is failing with java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: GC overhead limit exceeded on executor nodes of cluster databricks-cluster-07.

short_description: Oracle DB listener down on ora-prod-01
description: TNS listener on ora-prod-01 is not responding. Connection attempts from application servers are timing out with ORA-12541: TNS no listener.

short_description: Something broken in the data pipeline again
description: The nightly job did not complete. I checked and there are errors somewhere in the processing cluster. Last time this happened it was memory related on the spark nodes.
